name: esign-list
_note: tools.esign-list reads the caller's e-signature envelopes from globalThis._concordSTATE.toolsLens.envelopes, keyed by ctx.actor.userId, optionally filtered by status. STATE-backed, per-user — the macro-assassin runs with an internal owner actor, so {} returns ok:true with an empty envelopes array (NEVER no_db). total always equals envelopes.length.
